## What

<!-- Describe what this PR adds/changes -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New extension
- [ ] Modification to existing skill/extension
- [ ] Infrastructure / docs (targeting `main`)

## Target Branch

<!-- Must be 'set/<profile>' for skill/extension changes, or 'main' for infra/docs -->

## Validation Checklist

- [ ] Branch naming: source is `feature/<name>`, target is `set/<profile>` (or `main` for infra)
- [ ] Skills have valid `SKILL.md` with `name` and `description` frontmatter
- [ ] Extensions have `index.ts` and `README.md`
- [ ] No unrelated files deleted
- [ ] Changes are scoped to one skill, extension, or coherent change

## Cross-Set Note

<!-- If this change is useful for other set branches, mention it here -->
